_meta.metric: K-weighted LUFS delta vs the dry excitation, both through the Marsten_1960A_4x12 reference cab
_meta.excitation: plucked 110-1760 Hz multitone, peak -12 dBFS (same as amp_loudness_model)
_meta.note: out_db = how hot the pedal runs vs its input; input_slope = d(out)/d(in) at +12 dB (1=linear, ~0=hard clipper). Used by routes.py to estimate the level a pre-amp pedal chain feeds the amp and correct the amp trim via its input_curve.
